title: Member in Team Group cannot be assigned on People Column

posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Senior Monday.com users,

I notice one small part of team member. Even though the member is in the team group, which is subscribed on the board, the member cannot be individually assigned on People column.

For example,
Team User: A, B, C

You cannot assign jobs to A unless A is individually subscribed on the board.

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Han! Thank you for bringing this issue up! Seems like a bit of a frustrating one…my first thought is to make sure Team User A has been invited to the board and given access to edit.

If this doesn’t resolve the issue because it is is a monday platform inquiry, this question would go to monday support. You can reach out to them directly here: support@monday.com

Please let me know if you need anything else!
